3271950.name: VYJAZD
3271950.description:
Vyjazd is a fast-paced first-person co-op action-horror game where you and your team respond to bizarre emergencies caused by parodised Slovak YouTubers. Investigate locations, complete objectives, collect items, and escape before the situation gets out of control.

Work together - or go in alone

As you explore dark environments with unpredictable patrols, and chaotic encounters that mix horror with humor.

Each Incident challenges you to keep your nerve while staying quiet, staying hidden… and staying alive.

Gameplay Overview

  • First-person cooperative gameplay (1–4 players)

  • Explore each area to find tools and clues needed to complete your mission

  • Avoid loud noises and line of sight to stay hidden from hostile NPCs

  • Use teamwork to distract, support, and revive others

  • Extract safely — fail, and everyone loses

Features:

  • 4 unique levels (Incidents) with different layouts and objectives

  • Multiplayer Co-op Online — play with friends or alone

  • Dynamic AI enemies that stalk, chase, and surprise players

  • Horror inspired by Slovak creators

  • Replayable missions with random events and item spawns

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
